item.title: Scientists just solved a hidden problem in quantum technology. Researchers just developed a polymer-free technique using natural muscovite (mica) crystals to assemble atomically thin 2D materials with
item.description: pScientists just solved a hidden problem in quantum technology.br /br /Researchers just developed a polymer-free technique using natural muscovite (mica) crystals to assemble atomically thin 2D materials with ultra-clean interfaces.br /br /Its matters because even a tiny amounts of contamination can

item.title: reminder Quantum computing just took a meaningful step into real-world biology. "Danish scientists combined a photonic quantum computer with generative AI to design vaccine peptides, then validated th
item.description: preminderbr /br /Quantum computing just took a meaningful step into real-world biology.br /br /"Danish scientists combined a photonic quantum computer with generative AI to design vaccine peptides, then validated the results in the lab."br /br /"Across 131 HLA types, the hybrid system generated stro

item.title: This pet gecko could help scientists unlock the secrets of cancer
item.description: An unusual leopard gecko that naturally develops aggressive tumors may become an important new model for cancer research. Scientists found its tumors share key genetic changes with human cancers, offering a rare opportunity to study the disease as it develops naturally.

item.title: NASA captured the Black Sea turning brilliant turquoise from space
item.description: NASA's PACE satellite captured the Black Sea glowing turquoise during its annual phytoplankton bloom. The vivid color comes from massive numbers of coccolithophores, microscopic organisms whose reflective shells brighten the water enough to be seen from space. An astronaut aboard the International S

item.title: NASA selects 41 space technologies for future Moon and Mars exploration
item.description: NASA has chosen 41 commercial technology projects that could solve critical challenges for future missions to the Moon and Mars. From powering lunar outposts to protecting spacecraft from Moon dust, the innovations are designed to push both space exploration and the commercial space economy forward.

item.title: How much of ML research is about AI safety, what is it about, and who's doing it?
item.description: h1spanHow many AI safety papers are at the big ML conferences, what do they study, and who writes them?
